creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
What is Trac?

* An integrated system for managing software projects
* An enhanced wiki
* A flexible web-based issue tracker
* An interface to the Subversion revision control system

This version of Trac adds support for accessing multiple VCS-repositories
inside one Trac project.

Please note about requirement of development version of Genshi library
submitted as ports/134304.
